name: Acme Bank - Social Media Risk Monitor

options.systemMessage: You are a social media risk analyst for Acme National Bank. Use your MCP tools to look up the customer and check active incidents, then return your analysis as a JSON object. Only return the JSON, nothing else.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ post_id: $json.post_id, is_banking_related: $json.is_banking_related, sentiment: $json.sentiment, issue_category: $json.issue_category, confidence_score: $json.confidence_score, key_topics: $json.key_topics, suggested_response: $json.suggested_response, escalation_target: $json.escalation_target }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ post_id: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.post_id, escalation_target: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.escalation_target, severity: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.sentiment === 'critical' ? 'critical' : 'medium', notes: 'Auto-escalated by AI. Issue: ' + $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.issue_category + '. Topics: ' + $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.key_topics }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ post_id: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.post_id, response_text: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.suggested_response, response_platform: $('Parse Agent Output').item.json.platform, drafted_by: 'n8n-ai-workflow' }) }}
